nodes.body: <<FILL role=beat words=70 beats='the head marshal asks Kai to account for the day, every mark read and creature met and test faced, and to name the one thing that carried Kai the whole way through the Halyard Station'>>

Refuse, and wait for next season instead.

ending.title: Named a Marshal of the Halyard Station

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=60 beats='the marshals judge that mercy to the Drone Bay beasts is the truest marshal heart of all, and Kai is named a marshal of the Maintenance Crawl with honour'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=58 beats='the marshals laugh, not unkindly, at so plain an answer, and name Kai a marshal all the same, for honesty is the first mark they look for'>>

ending.title: Named for a Plain True Answer

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=60 beats='Kai walks the Maintenance Crawl through the dark and comes out at dawn footsore but standing, given a real place among the outer marshals, a hard crossing well won'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=50 beats='the Airlock marshals see Kai the moment the shadow moves, and a Certification ended by sneaking is no pass at all, only a quiet walk back out'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=50 beats='the last klaxon dies while Kai sits spent in the grass, the bar stays drawn, and the Certification is lost to be attempted again when the season turns'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=50 beats='Kai will not take a lesser crossing on tired legs, and turns for home to try the whole Certification again next season with more read in the marks'>>
